eng.definition: an acquired or natural skill at performing a task.
examples: He has a knack for making friends easily.
She has the knack of making people feel comfortable.
He's got a knack for playing the piano.

hin.definition: Engaged in, involving, or reflecting deep or serious thought
examples: वह बहुत विचारवान और अनुभवी व्यक्ति है.
मैंने उसे विचारवान तरीके से अपने काम करते हुए देखा.
मेरी मां हमेशा कहती है कि मैं विचारवान बनने की कोशिश करूं.
